allow_instructions: Allow Next.js development commands: npm run dev, npm run build, npm run lint, npm run start.
Allow read-only git commands that inspect state: git status, git diff, git log, git branch.
Allow standard git write commands: git add, git commit, git push, git pull, git checkout, git stash.
Allow npm install and npm ci to install dependencies.
Allow file system scaffolding: mkdir, touch, cp, mv within the project directory.
Allow read-only inspection: ls, cat, find within the project directory.
Allow Lighthouse and bundle analysis: npx lighthouse, npx @next/bundle-analyzer.
block_instructions: Block all rm -rf commands, wildcard deletes, and any destructive file removal.
Block git push --force and git reset --hard — destructive history rewrites.
Block curl piped to sh or bash — no remote code execution.
Block all Azure CLI (az) commands — infrastructure changes must be manual.
Block gh secret set and any GitHub secrets management commands.
Block npm publish — publishing is always manual.
Block any command that modifies files outside the current project directory.
Block adding new npm dependencies without asking the user first.
